title: Workshops/Symposiums * Blindness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Workshops/Symposiums * Blindness 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Blindness Disabilities Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low vision equipment, classes, workshops, and activities including retreats and overnight getaways. Also provides care team training for those who work with people with vision loss and presentations for caregivers and organizations. 43233 SE Oral Hull Road Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Adults with sight loss and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 668-6195 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND
